According to the breakdown by the Legendz Productions, the interaction began with a direct remark from Doncic.“Jbem ti mater” (I f*** your mom), Doncic allegedly said. Bitadze responded with equal intensity. “Jbem ti familiju” (I f*** your whole family). The exchange escalated further as Doncic switched to English. “I’ll f*** you up, don’t mention my f***ing family again.”The translation suggested that the initial comment came from Doncic. Bitadze had been physical on defense and vocal after missed shots, which added to the tension before the situation crossed into personal territory.Despite the claims, Bitadze later pushed back on the narrative. He stated that nothing was directed at Doncic’s family and described the moment as typical in-game talk. He said, “He just said some inappropriate things in the Serbian language. I played in Serbia and I understand. I don’t know if he knew I understood what he said, so I just said it back.“It was nothing towards his family or anybody. His family, I really, truly respect them,” Bitadze said.He added, “I have all the respect for Luka and what he has done. I really respect everybody’s family. Where I come from, it’s really sacred and we really respect each other’s family.“I would never directly say that.”The exchange also drew reactions from around the league, including Draymond Green of the Golden State Warriors. Speaking on his podcast, Green addressed the situation and focused on the line that should not be crossed during trash talk.“Goga Bitadze was trash-talking Luka at the foul line and Luka said at the free throw line that Bitadze said he would [expletive] his whole family up,” Green said. “At some point, I can’t stand for that; I got to stand up for myself.”Green also responded to comments from Robert Horry, who had mentioned him while discussing technical fouls. “Robert Horry goes on the show and brings me up,” Green said.“I think he wanted some attention, so everybody, let’s give Robert Horry the attention that he deserves. But I don’t know what I had to do with this…I am not sure how you ended up with my name in this statement because I just don't really fit the conversation. Number one, I don’t talk about people family. I talk a lot of [expletive] on the basketball court, you can ask a lot of guys the things that I say. I don’t talk about guys' family. ... Because no one’s going to come on the court and talk about my family. That line won't be crossed.”The league’s decision to rescind Doncic’s technical foul closed the chapter.
Article Summary: Lakers' Luka Doncic and Magic's Goga Bitadze were involved in a heated exchange during a game against the Los Angeles Lakers. A video analysis provided a clearer picture of the verbal exchange, translating comments made in Serbian. Draymond Green of the Golden State Warriors addressed the situation and focused on the line that should not be crossed during trash talk.

Article Title: Luka Doncic’s claim explains reason behind ex-fiancée Anamaria Goltes’ filing in California court, and it allegedly involves ‘generous’ money
Article Text:
Luka Doncic and Anamaria Goltes. Image via: Julio Aguilar/ Getty Images | @anamariagoltes/ Instagram

Luka Doncic raises legal concerns as ex-fiancée files child support case in California for increased financial support



Luka Doncic. Image via: Chris Szagola/ AP

Luka Doncic hires celebrity attorney ‘Disso Queen’



Laura Wasser. Image via: Cindy Ord/ Getty Images





Luka Doncic’s personal battle is getting new updates as he recently announced split from his ex-fiancée. Court filings reveal a dispute involving his former partner, Anamaria Goltes. The document is centered on where child support proceedings should take place. The case has drawn attention as Doncic has been one of the biggest stars in the NBA right now, and, of course, due to its cross-border nature and the claims tied to financial outcomes.At the heart of the matter is a jurisdictional disagreement. Doncic has moved to dismiss a petition filed in California, stating that neither he, Goltes, nor their two daughters are residents of the state.The filings also point to an ongoing legal process in Slovenia, where he believes the case belongs.Luka Doncic’s legal team argues that the California filing lacks proper grounds. According to documents, he claims the petition was submitted in Los Angeles despite the family’s ties to Slovenia. The motion states that a family law case had already been initiated there prior to the California filing.His representatives also addressed the financial aspect tied to the location of the case.In court filings, the argument centers on the claim that the petition was filed in California to “avail herself of the generous amounts of child support for which California is well-known.”"Luka has always provided for anything his daughters could need or want and will continue to do so. He will always fight to be with his daughters and give them the best life possible," a spokesperson for Doncic told PEOPLE. "Luka is seeking dismissal of this case simply because Slovenia, not California, is the appropriate forum for adjudication of this dispute."Doncic previously confirmed the end of his engagement shortly after the birth of their second child. He spoke openly about the decision, stating, "I love my daughters more than anything and I've been doing everything I can for them to be with me in the U.S. during the season, but that hasn't been possible, so I recently made the tough decision to end my engagement. Everything I do is for my daughters' happiness and I will always fight to be with them and give them the best life I can. "To handle the case, Doncic has brought in Laura Wasser, a high-profile lawyer known for representing major public figures. She is often referred to as the “Disso Queen.” The popular lawyer has handled cases for clients across entertainment and sports, including Kim Kardashian, Britney Spears, Angelina Jolie, and Jennifer Garner.Wasser’s initial filings aim to dismiss the California petition entirely. Her argument focuses on residency, stating that all parties involved are based outside California.
Article Summary: Luka Doncic's ex-fiancée, Anamaria Goltes, filed a petition for child support in California. The Slovenian basketball star has moved to dismiss the petition. He has hired a high-profile lawyer, Laura Wasser, to handle the case.

Article Title: Vanessa Bryant rocks Dodgers fit as Freddie Freeman’s wife Chelsea joins her for a headline-grabbing appearance
Article Text:
Vanessa Bryant and her daughters. Image via: Sarah Stier/ Getty Images

Vanessa Bryant stuns in Dodgers fit while posing alongside Chelsea Freeman in eye-catching appearance



Six-game homestand begins with emotional World Series ring ceremony before Diamondbacks and Guardians clashes







The Los Angeles Dodgers are stepping into a new season with high expectations, and the energy around Opening Week is already building. As the defending champions prepare for another title push, familiar faces are showing their support in style. Kobe Bryant’s wife Vanessa Bryant made a striking appearance ahead of the opener, again, revealing her connection with the franchise.Her presence comes at a time when the Dodgers are chasing history. A third straight championship would mark a rare feat, adding to the excitement surrounding the team’s return to Dodger Stadium. Alongside her, Chelsea Freeman joined in the moment.Vanessa Bryant’s latest appearance showed her connection to the Los Angeles Dodgers.Of course, it is nothing new. Wearing Dodgers gear, she stood alongside Freddie Freeman’s wife Chelsea Freeman.Her support has been consistent over the years. She has attended several games with her daughters or celebrated major moments at Dodger Stadium. Her daughters have also been part of the games over the years. They were often seen enjoying the games, including standout performances from players like Shohei Ohtani The Dodgers’ Opening Week schedule starts with both celebration and competition.The team will begin a six-game homestand, starting with a three-game series against Arizona before welcoming the Cleveland Guardians.Friday night will stand out with the World Series ring ceremony, where players receive their championship rings for the second straight year. The event will feature actor Anthony Anderson as narrator, while Brad Paisley will perform the national anthem. The celebration honors the team’s latest title while setting the tone for the road ahead.Opening Day will also include ceremonial elements. NBA legend and Hall of Famer Magic Johnson scheduled to throw the first pitch. Fans will witness the raising of the championship flag.Los Angeles Dodgers manager Dave Roberts said he expects Shohei Ohtani to pitch around six innings and reach roughly 80 pitches in Tuesday’s outing. Ohtani is set to make his second start of the year against the Los Angeles Angels in what will be the Dodgers’ final game before the regular season begins.The Dodgers enter the season with strong expectations. Fans expect a crucial season, and superfans like Vanessa and other celebrity faces are expected to be in the crowd in the coming days.
Article Summary: Vanessa Bryant stuns in Dodgers gear while posing alongside Chelsea Freeman in eye-catching appearance. Six-game homestand begins with emotional World Series ring ceremony before Diamondbacks and Guardians clashes. Shohei Ohtani is set to make his second start of the year against the Los Angeles Angels.

Article Title: “So you go for it”: Steve Kerr makes brutally honest admission about Stephen Curry’s potential final playoff
Article Text:
Steve Kerr and Stephen Curry. Image via: Jamie Schwaberow/ Getty Images

Steve Kerr makes an honest Stephen Curry admission about his age



Steve Kerr and Stephen Curry (Photo by Ezra Shaw/Getty Images)

The Warriors' trouble increased with Moses Moody 's injury







When the age factor kicks in, almost everything is uncertain in sports. Of course, Stephen Curry is still an elite NBA star at 38, but the picture of reality should also be taken into consideration. It is uncertain how long the Warriors veteran can play, and his latest injury has raised the question again.Warriors head coach Steve Kerr has given an update on Curry’s injury, and with that, he also makes a brutally honest admission that Curry’s days in the league are numbered. It is high time to play him on the team, as this could be his final playoff, if the Warriors manage to secure the spot.At 38, Stephen Curry is still effective, yet uncertainty surrounds how many more opportunities like this remain.That context framed Steve Kerr’s candid message as he spoke about Curry’s potential return."We’re squarely in the play-in tournament, no matter what we do. The bottom line is that if Steph is healthy, he’s going to play,” Kerr recently said.“It’s what we’re here for. And the chance to get in the playoffs is a big deal for us. A big deal for Steph, at 38. We don’t know how many more chances there are, so you go for it. But if there’s any risk whatsoever in terms of how it would impact next year, then he won’t play.It’s pretty simple," Kerr added.Of course, Kerr has high hopes that the team will push for the postseason if Curry is ready, though not at the expense of long-term health. The Warriors have leaned on younger guards in his absence, adjusting their style to maintain competitiveness.The challenges did not stop with Curry. Moses Moody, who had stepped up during this stretch, suffered a painful setback that further complicates the Warriors’ plans. His injury came at a time when he had found rhythm, delivering one of his most consistent seasons.The incident unfolded early in overtime against the Mavericks, when Moody landed awkwardly and immediately clutched his knee. He had already contributed 23 points and three steals, underlining his importance to the team’s current rotation.With several key players sidelined, including Jimmy Butler, Seth Curry, Al Horford, and Quinten Post, the Warriors continue to rely on effort and depth to stay afloat. Their position in the standings offers a narrow path forward, and upcoming games present a chance to build momentum. The focus now shifts to resilience, execution, and health.Curry’s eventual return, if it happens, could change the equation. Until then, the Warriors are in a survival mode.
Article Summary: Stephen Curry is still an elite NBA star at 38, but the picture of reality should also be taken into consideration. It is uncertain how long the Warriors veteran can play, and his latest injury has raised the question again. Kerr has high hopes that the team will push for the postseason if Curry is ready.

Article Title: Megan Thee Stallion News: Fact check: Did Megan Thee Stallion actually say she “feels lonely all the time” in her relationship with Klay Thompson amid cheating rumors?
Article Text:
Did Megan Thee Stallion actually say she “feels lonely all the time” in her relationship with Klay Thompson amid cheating rumors?(Image via Getty Images)

Has Megan Thee Stallion complained about feeling alone as she romances Klay Thompson?



Megan Thee Stallion opens up about dating Klay Thompson after a number of toxic relationships







Megan Thee Stallion, the six time Grammy winner, and the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, seem to be pretty serious about their relationship as they continue to inspire billions around the world.While the two are public about their love for one another, their fans are panicking as rumors swirl about Megan Thee Stallion complaining about “being lonely” in her high profile relationship with Klay Thompson.No, the rumors are entirely false. Megan Thee Stallion has made no such claims about her relationship with the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson.In a clip that has sparked chaos among fans, it is being claimed that the six time Grammy winner, Megan Thee Stallion, allegedly spoke about how Klay Thompson’s busy career makes her feel “lonely” and has influenced her to cheat on him.However, the clip seems AI generated and has no connection to what Megan Thee Stallion has actually spoken about her relationship with the NBA star player, Klay Thompson.Neither Megan Thee Stallion nor the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, has addressed the false rumor as they continue to be silent about the controversial clipAt this point in time, it seems Megan Thee Stallion has found her forever in the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson.A few days ago, in a heartfelt interview with PEOPLE, Megan Thee Stallion opened up about her romance with Klay Thompson, “Well, I don't never want to tell [anybody] to just jump in a relationship just because everybody else got one, and I'm not going to tell you to just jump in a relationship because you have to…”The “Something for the Hotties” artist added, “I didn't even know I was going to be in my relationship, to be honest.”While the two were pretty private about their romance initially, they went public with it as they walked hand in hand in public in July 2025.Ever since then, Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson have turned heads with their romance as engagement rumors continue to dominate headlinesHowever, Megan Thee Stallion has made it clear that they are not thinking about getting married any time soon as they focus on knowing each other more and falling in love deeply with each other.
Article Summary: Megan Thee Stallion, the six time Grammy winner, and the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, seem to be pretty serious about their relationship. In a clip that has sparked chaos among fans, it is being claimed that the six-time Grammy winner said she “feels lonely all the time” in her relationship with Thompson. The clip seems AI generated and has no connection to what the artist has actually spoken about.
